title: E-commerce API Documentation
description: Dynamic E-Commerce Workflow Management with real-time inventory updates, secure user authentication, and automated order reporting. Publicly documented via Postman.

title: Course Booking API Documentation
description: RESTful API for managing course enrollments — user registration, authentication, course creation, archiving, and student enrollment. Documented on Postman.

title: Course Booking App
description: MERN-stack enrollment system with user registration, authentication, profile management, and seamless course browsing and enrollment capabilities.

title: E-commerce App
description: Full MERN e-commerce platform with dynamic catalog, real-time search, cart management, secure checkout, and an admin dashboard with live analytics.

title: Airline Booking System Mockup
description: Conceptual UI design for flight search, seat selection, and booking confirmation — focused on intuitive user experience and workflow efficiency.

title: Airline Booking System Prototype
description: Interactive prototype simulating end-to-end airline booking — flight search, reservation, payment processing, and real-time ticket management.

title: Short Courses Capstone
description: Capstone web platform for short course enrollment, integrating front-end design, backend logic, and database management into a cohesive experience.
